summary: Updated PR body to the printed CLI template with CLI shape, reviewed PR #1149 comments for the capabilities/dashboard-handoff pattern, and added more SendFox-specific novel agent commands around capability discovery, hygiene, launch planning, CSV audit/reconciliation, and webhook handoffs.
validation: dry-run smoke: capabilities, contacts audit-csv, contacts reconcile-csv, workflow launch-plan, webhooks handoff
notes: Campaign create/send and webhook CRUD remain dashboard handoffs because the documented SendFox public API exposes campaign reads and webhook setup docs, not public write endpoints.
